items.definition_en: A flower is the colorful part of a plant that often smells nice.
items.example_en: She picked a red flower from the garden.

items.definition_en: A tree is a tall plant with a trunk and branches.
items.example_en: The tree in our garden gives us lots of shade.

items.definition_en: A bush is a plant that is smaller than a tree and has many branches.
items.example_en: The children hid behind the bush.

items.definition_en: Grass is a short green plant that covers the ground.
items.example_en: We sat on the grass and had a picnic.

items.definition_en: An herb is a plant that people use for cooking or medicine.
items.example_en: She grows mint and basil, which are her favorite herbs.

items.definition_en: A rose is a beautiful flower that often has a sweet smell.
items.example_en: There is a pink rose blooming near the path.

items.definition_en: A leaf is the flat, green part of a plant that grows from the stem.
items.example_en: A leaf fell from the plant onto the ground.

items.definition_en: A root is the part of a plant that grows underground and takes in water.
items.example_en: The carrot is a root we can eat.

items.definition_en: A fruit is the part of a plant that has seeds and can be eaten.
items.example_en: The apple tree in my garden is full of fruit.

items.definition_en: A vegetable is a plant or part of a plant that people eat.
items.example_en: We grow a different vegetable in each part of the garden.

items.definition_en: A seed is a small part of a plant that can grow into a new plant.
items.example_en: He planted a seed in the ground.

items.definition_en: A shrub is a low bush with woody stems.
items.example_en: We have planted a new shrub next to the fence.

items.definition_en: A vine is a plant with a long stem that climbs or spreads.
items.example_en: Grapes grow on a vine in our backyard.

items.definition_en: A fern is a green plant with long, feathery leaves.
items.example_en: The fern grows well in shady corners of the garden.

items.definition_en: A bulb is a round part of some plants that grows underground.
items.example_en: She planted a tulip bulb in the spring.

items.definition_en: A cactus is a plant with thick stems and sharp spines.
items.example_en: The cactus in the pot does not need much water.

items.definition_en: A stem is the long, thin part of a plant that supports the leaves and flowers.
items.example_en: The flower has a strong green stem.

items.definition_en: A bean is a small seed or pod from a plant that people can eat.
items.example_en: We grow bean plants along the back fence.

items.definition_en: Lettuce is a green leafy plant that people use in salads.
items.example_en: Fresh lettuce grows quickly in warm weather.

items.definition_en: A sunflower is a tall plant with a large yellow flower.
items.example_en: Every summer, tall sunflowers grow along the fence.
